---
name: 📖 Playbook Request / Proposal
about: Propose or request a new B2B revenue experiment playbook
title: '[PLAYBOOK]: <Short Title of the Playbook>'
labels: playbook, help wanted
assignees: ''
---

### 💡 Playbook Concept Summary
*Provide a 2-3 sentence overview of the B2B service or experiment you want to add.*

### 🎯 Target Customers (ICP)
*Who are the target buyers? (e.g. Local dentist clinics, SaaS solo-founders, Shopify store owners)*

### 🛑 Pain & Outcome
* **Pain solved:** *What is the specific money leak or workflow issue?*
* **Outcome promised:** *What is the concrete, testable outcome of the service?*

### 🛠️ Required Skills & Tools
*What skills or tools are necessary to execute this? (e.g. Make.com, Cold calling, Canva, SEO audits)*

### 📅 Preview of the 7-Day Sprint
*What are the first 3 days of outreach actions?*
* **Day 1:**
* **Day 2:**
* **Day 3:**

### ⚠️ Ethical Check
* Does this playbook avoid mass spam/bulk cold DMs? (Yes/No)
* Does it avoid fake reviews/credentials? (Yes/No)
* Does it avoid income guarantees? (Yes/No)
*(Note: We reject playbooks that violate these rules.)*
